description: Human-curated golden set for the analyst chat agent. Each item pairs a case + question with facts the grounded answer MUST contain. Used by eval/responsible_ai.py to score answer groundedness without an LLM judge ($0), and by the optional LLM-as-judge.

items.question: What typology is this and how confident are we?
How much money is involved in total?
Is there any sanctions or PEP hit?
What is the overall risk band?
Have we seen similar cases before?
Who is the subject of this investigation?
